data.content_ref: inline:The account frames the collapse as a deliberate, coordinated dismantling of palatial bureaucracy by subject populations, yet it provides no mechanism for how illiterate or semi-literate subsistence farmers across disparate linguistic and cultural zones (Mycenaean, Hittite, Levantine) would coordinate a 'contagious' rebellion without the very administrative infrastructure they were allegedly revolting against. The 'contagion' metaphor masks an absence of any actual transmission mechanism across politically disconnected territories.
